---
title: "Belajar R - Analisis Regresi Produksi Beras 2023"
author: "Daffa Faaiz Al-Zakkii"
date: "2026-05-03"
output: rmdformats::downcute
---

# Load Data

```{r}
library(readxl)
data <- read_excel("C:\\Users\\ACER\\OneDrive\\Dokumen\\Produksi_Beras_2023.xlsx")
View(data)
head(data)
```

# Struktur Data

```{r}
str(data)
```

# Summary Data

```{r}
summary(data)
```

# Missing Value

```{r}
colSums(is.na(data))
```
